name: Butterscotch Oaties
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Combine butterscotch bits and margarine; melt over boiling water.
3. Remove from heat.
4. Dissolve baking soda in 2 tablespoons boiling water, then add to the butterscotch mix.
5. Gradually blend in the remaining ingredients.
6. Drop by slightly rounded teaspoonfuls onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake about 10 minutes, cool on a wire rack.
